title: "I Have No Life But This,"
content:
I have no life but this,
    To lead it here;
    Nor any death, but lest
    Dispelled from there;

    Nor tie to earths to come,
    Nor action new,
    Except through this extent,
    The realm of you.
meaning:
""I Have No Life But This,"" is a quintessential example of Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
